name: Nexus Uranium Corp.
description: Nexus Uranium Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of uranium projects in North America. The company is strategically positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for nuclear energy, particularly driven by the needs of AI data centers. Its portfolio includes multiple projects in the United States, such as the resource-stage Chord project in South Dakota, which are potentially amenable to in-situ recovery (ISR) methods. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, Nexus Uranium aims to support domestic uranium supply chains to meet the increasing global requirements for carbon-free baseload power.
